title: 12726Wetreport6Uu26Y
summary:
Main
• VLCC Rates Soften but Remain at Historically High Levels - The dirty tanker market continues to trade at substantially higher year-over-year levels, with the Baltic Dirty Tanker Index currently around 90% above the same period last year. This underscores that, in aggregate, freight rates across dirty tanker routes remain well above historical norms, despite recent short-term adjustments in spot markets. Toward the end of January, market indicators point to softer momentum in VLCC spot rates, reflected in negative week-over-week movements on key benchmark routes.
